code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut p = 0
mut neg = 0
mut cur = ""

while i < n + 1
  mut b = 32
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 32
    end
  end

  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          p = p + v
        else if v < 0
          neg = neg + v
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let answer = p - neg
print("r=#{answer}")
